# Dot parity dashboard

Differential survey of graphviz-ts vs the native `dot` oracle over the dot
test corpus. A report, not a gate (AD-1). Regenerate: `npx tsx
test/corpus/survey.ts && npx tsx test/corpus/dashboard.ts`.

## Divergence backlog (next missions)

Named buckets, largest first. Each is a candidate oracle-pinned fix mission.

### diverged — by firstDiffPath shape

| bucket | count | examples | hypothesis |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `path-structure` | 128 | `1213-1`, `1213-2`, `1332` | edge path has a different command sequence or point count — spline routing structure |
| `element-count` | 62 | `1323`, `1323_1`, `1367` | missing/extra SVG elements — node, edge, cluster box, or arrowhead count differs |
| `attr-or-tag` | 8 | `1453`, `1622_0`, `1880` | element tag or a non-coordinate attribute differs |
| `compare-threw` | 1 | `1472` | compareSvg threw on the port SVG — malformed or partial output |
| `color-stroke` | 1 | `2184` | fill/stroke value differs — color resolution or default styling |
